title: 2026 Oscars Winners Summary
text: Best Picture: One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.) took home the top prize, securing six total Oscars including Best Director for Paul Thomas Anderson and Best Adapted Screenplay, also for Anderson. Best Supporting Actor: Sean Penn won this award for his role in One Battle After Another, setting a record with his win. Notably, Penn was absent from the ceremony. Best Actor: Michael B. Jordan claimed Best Actor for Sinners, which earned four total Oscars at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony. Best Actress: Jessie Buckley won for her performance in Hamnet. Best Supporting Actress: Amy Madigan received the award for her role in Weapons. Notable Achievements: Warner Bros. powered to a record night with multiple major wins. Sinners cinematographer Autumn Durald Arkapaw became the first woman to ever win the award in that category. The Oscars introduced a new Best Casting category, won by Cassandra Kulukundis for One Battle After Another. KPop Demon Hunters won Best Animated Feature; its song Golden became the first K-pop song to ever win an Oscar. The ceremony was hosted by Conan O'Brien at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles.
